identities.base: Bad_CA(f_alpha,g_alpha;delta_a) = Bad_MCA(f_alpha,g_alpha;delta_a) = {P(alpha): deg(P)<k+1 and P agrees with U on >=a points}
identities.interleaved: BadVec(alpha;a) = {(P_1(alpha),...,P_mu(alpha)): each deg(P_i)<k+1 and all P_i agree with U_i on a common >=a support}

non_claims: does not prove a deployed adjacent upper certificate
does not prove full list-to-MCA equivalence outside the simple-pole bridge
